import React from 'react'; export default function About() { return (
{/* Left Side: Story & Buttons */}

HOME OF Dat pizza guy.

Our slowly-fermented, hand-stretched dough is carefully prepared daily. Baked in our signature authentic brick ovens at searing temperatures, it results in that unmistakable flavor, perfect char, and airy crust that defines the true Johnny Gio's experience.

We're passionate about bringing the best pizza directly to you. Premium ingredients, authentic recipes, and a lot of heart goes into every single pizza we serve.

{/* Right Side: Spacer for the massive pizza overlapping from Hero */}
{/* Deliberately empty to let the absolute positioned pizza from Hero overlap here */}
); }
